positive: A whimsical, highly detailed illustration of a celestial fox spirit (kitsune) playfully leaping among overgrown jungle flora. The fox should have striking, vibrant markings and expressive eyes, rendered in a stylized neo-traditional tattoo art style. The composition is centered, showcasing the fox in a dynamic, graceful pose against a deep indigo and emerald green background. Use strong black outlines, limited palette with jewel tones (sapphire blue, jade green, amethyst purple, gold accents), and high contrast for optimal print visibility. Focus on intricate floral patterns, glowing bioluminescent elements in the foliage, and a symmetrical composition suitable for a chest print. Clean silhouettes are paramount.
